title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running large language models locally with support for Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and others.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, providing simple synchronous and asynchronous APIs to chat with local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, installable via npm and usable in Node.js or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, enabling local models in chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with multi-model support, code highlighting, and RAG via document uploads.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama, published to Maven Central, supporting chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama, offering idiomatic Ruby methods to chat and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Lightweight React chat interface for Ollama, packaged as a static Docker image for quick deployment.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Experimental RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store with FastAPI backend.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama, supporting DM and channel conversations with configurable models.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter client for Ollama, published to pub.dev for mobile and desktop apps.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n node that adds Ollama chat and embedding capabilities to no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate for Ollama, providing strongly-typed APIs and async tokio support.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot using the python-telegram-bot library to chat with Ollama models privately or in groups.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app for Ollama with session memory, model switching, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for Ollama, allowing local models in retrieval pipelines and generators.
